nasb.text: slanderers, haters of God, insolent, arrogant, boastful, inventors of evil, disobedient to parents,

esv.text: slanderers, haters of God, insolent, haughty, boastful, inventors of evil, disobedient to parents,

cnv.text: 毀謗人的、憎恨　神的、凌辱人的、傲慢的、自誇的、製造惡事的、忤逆父母的、

ccb.text: 背后批评、怨恨上帝、欺侮别人、心骄气傲、自高自大、自我吹捧、无恶不作、违背父母、

csbs.text: 诽谤人、憎恨神、侮慢人、骄傲、自夸、制造恶行、悖逆父母、
